TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Hbun-lesa ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 19 buwan, 61 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 82% kyan ku 50 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 18% kyan ku 11 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 75%, Amis 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 5%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Hbun-lesa hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Hbun-lesa hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Hbun-lesa hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Hbun-lesa hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Hbun-lesa hya' ga Piling. tay mkyahu' na Hbun-lesa hya' ga Paqiy. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ħβun-les~ɕa ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu naħuj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ħβun-les~ɕa ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na ħβun-les~ɕa ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ħβun-les~ɕa ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na ħβun-les~ɕa ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na ħβun-les~ɕa ħjaʔ ɣa piliŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ħβun-les~ɕa ħjaʔ ɣa paqij. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Hbun-lesa ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 19 buwan, 61 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 82% kyan ku 50 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 18% kyan ku 11 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 75%, Amis 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 5%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Hbun-lesa hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Hbun-lesa hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Hbun-lesa hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Hbun-lesa hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Hbun-lesa hya' ga Piling. tay mkyahu' na Hbun-lesa hya' ga Paqiy. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ħβun-les~ɕa ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu naħuj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ħβun-les~ɕa ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na ħβun-les~ɕa ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ħβun-les~ɕa ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na ħβun-les~ɕa ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na ħβun-les~ɕa ħjaʔ ɣa piliŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ħβun-les~ɕa ħjaʔ ɣa paqij. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
